client_id.description: Clazar OAuth2 client id. Used only for the client_credentials token exchange; never logged.

client_secret.description: Clazar OAuth2 client secret. Used only for the client_credentials token exchange; never logged.

base_url.description: Clazar API base URL override for tests or proxies; also used to derive the OAuth2 token endpoint (base_url + /authenticate/).

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; only objects last modified at or after this time are read on a fresh sync.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
